entities.name: IMPROVED FALLOW
entities.description: The practice of using specific legumes to improve soil fertility and crop productivity during fallow periods

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of crop output and efficiency

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: The ability of soil to provide essential nutrients for plant growth

entities.name: CLIMATE-FORCING GAS EMISSIONS
entities.description: The release of greenhouse gases such as N2O and CO2 into the atmosphere

entities.name: GLIRICIDIA SEPIUM
entities.description: A nitrogen-fixing legume species used in improved fallow systems

entities.name: ACACIA COLEI
entities.description: A legume species used in improved fallow systems

entities.name: TRADITIONAL UNAMENDED FALLOW
entities.description: A fallow system where land is left unplanted without any amendments

entities.name: CONTINUOUS CULTIVATION
entities.description: A farming system where crops are grown every season without fallow periods

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: FOLIAR NUTRIENTS
entities.description: The concentration of nitrogen, potassium, and magnesium in plant leaves

entities.name: LIGNIN AND POLYPHENOLS
entities.description: Complex organic polymers found in plant cell walls and tissues

entities.name: SIMULATED RAINFALL EXPERIMENT
entities.description: A controlled experiment used to measure the efflux of gases from soil after rainfall

entities.name: NITROUS OXIDE
entities.description: A potent greenhouse gas (N2O) emitted from soil

entities.name: CARBON DIOXIDE
entities.description: A greenhouse gas (CO2) emitted from soil

entities.name: SOIL NUTRIENT COMPOSITION
entities.description: The chemical makeup and availability of nutrients in the soil

entities.name: MICROBIAL ACTIVITY
entities.description: The biological processes carried out by microorganisms in the soil

entities.name: SEMI-ARID CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions characterized by low and irregular rainfall

entities.name: DRY LAND REGIONS
entities.description: Geographic areas characterized by arid or semi-arid climates
